metadata.title: FITorNOT
metadata.description: Cross-platform buying checks with live evidence, noise filtering, and a clear verdict.

search.title: See Through the Listing Before You Buy
search.card_title: Describe the product, add links if you have them, and let FITorNOT audit the real signal.
search.prompt_placeholder: Example: I want to buy an Anker 10000mAh power bank, but can it go on a plane?
search.link_placeholder: Optional links from JD, Taobao, Xiaohongshu, or anywhere else

history.title: History
history.description: Only the latest 3 finished reports are kept on this device.

loading.title: Review in Progress
loading.description: We are collecting platform evidence, stripping noise, and building a report you can actually trust.
loading.error_description: The request paused before the report was ready. You can retry from here.
loading.step_collect: Collecting listing details and review signals
loading.step_filter: Removing spam, fluff, and low-value comments

result.empty_title: This result is no longer available
result.empty_description: The report was not found in your recent local history.
result.no_specs: No verified specs were returned for this report.
result.no_core_scandals: No hard red flags were captured in the current evidence.
result.no_soft_drawbacks: No scenario-specific drawbacks were captured in the current evidence.
result.history_hint: Recent reports are stored locally on this browser only.
